context: Checkpoint 2026-04-30T00:52Z after generic stream CLI slices. Branch develop; latest pushed HEAD 68e0fe80 test(tractor): parse generic stream watch filters. current_tasks: Previous CI run 25141050981 for ecc7bf6c passed.

Pushed generic stream CLI ergonomics stack: c9d055a3 handoff checkpoint; 5e91023e feat(tractor): filter stream query results; 81539110 feat(tractor): watch generic stream nodes; 16927e37 docs(agent): document generic stream CLI; 4d0c9218 docs(agent): update stream CLI roadmap; 68e0fe80 test(tractor): parse generic stream watch filters.

Tractor query now accepts --agent and --stream-ref filters and sorts stream-ish payloads by timestamp_ns/updated_at_ns/started_at_ns plus sequence/id. This makes StreamChunk and StreamSession inspection usable without daemon.

Tractor watch now accepts --type and --stream-ref. AgentResponse without --stream-ref keeps the compatibility renderer. Generic StreamChunk/StreamSession watch uses payload fingerprints so StreamSession upserts can be observed, and --until-final stops on is_final=true or status completed/failed.
Docs updated in docs/agent-streaming.md with generic query/watch examples. ROADMAP updated for generic StreamChunk/StreamSession CLI query/watch.

Local validations run for the CLI slices: RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable cargo test --bin tractor --quiet; targeted cargo test --bin tractor watch_cli_accepts_generic_stream_filters --quiet; npm --prefix packages/tractor run lint; npm run project:validate --silent; git diff --check.
Disk cleanup performed with npm run clean:light after push; free disk back to about 3.9GB.
